headline: Inflation jumps as AI and consumer tech tensions build
summary: U.S. inflation rose at its fastest pace in nearly four years after a war-driven spike in gasoline and diesel prices, putting fresh pressure on households and the White House. In tech, security concerns swirled around Anthropic's new Mythos model after some cybersecurity experts warned about its implications, while OpenAI faced a separate shock when a suspect was arrested after allegedly attacking Sam Altman's home and threatening the company's headquarters. Apple, meanwhile, moved its foldable iPhone rumors closer to product reality as testing advanced.
why_it_matters: Energy costs, AI safety concerns, and big-platform product bets are all converging into economic and tech risk people will feel quickly.
stories_used: Record gas price surge fuels sharp rise in U.S. inflation - Honolulu Star-Advertiser
Sam Altman’s Home Attacked With Molotov Cocktail, Suspect Taken Into Custody - WSJ
What smart people are saying about Mythos, Anthropic's new AI model that has some cybersecurity experts spooked - Business Insider
